programme.title: Live: The Big Money Show
programme.desc: Taylor Riggs, Brian Brenberg and Jackie DeAngelis host an informative and fast-paced hour filled with business topics that impact everyone from Wall Street to the average person.

programme.desc: Capturing the chaos of the last hour on Wall Street.

programme.title: Live: Kudlow
programme.desc: Host Larry Kudlow leads roundtable discussions on the policies impacting the domestic and global economies and interviews with business influencers across the world.

programme.title: Live: The Evening Edit
programme.desc: Breaking down the news of the day after the markets close.

programme.desc: Taking on the debated issues in the business and political world, plus the kitchen table topics that matter to Americans.

programme.title: Kudlow
programme.desc: Host Larry Kudlow leads roundtable discussions on the policies impacting the domestic and global economies and interviews with business influencers across the world.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A victim in a wheelchair fights back against an aggressive bully; a barely dressed couple in a biting match; a reckless driver is pulled over.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers chase a fleeing suspect through oncoming traffic; police find an attacker using surveillance footage; tracking a subject into a stranger's apartment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers learn that a taser cannot take some suspects down; a couple undressing in a pickup truck; arresting a polite suspect.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect runs through a hotel fence; two brothers involved in a knife fight; a man fires his BB gun at a neighbor's child.

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle is here & it is a once-in-a-lifetime coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: Rare 1920's Silver
programme.desc: Add a 10-Coin or 20-Coin Roll of the iconic Peace Silver Dollars from 1922-1925 in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your collection. Honoring the peace achieved after WWI, these Classic American Silver coins boast historical significance.

programme.title: 1776 Rare USA Gold
programme.desc: Own the 1776-2026 American 1oz Gold Buffalo featuring a Liberty Bell Privy mark, celebrating 250 years of the USA, and graded PF70UCAM. Struck from .9999 pure gold using the classic Buffalo Nickel design, it's one of the rarest releases this year.

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM; this coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.desc: Undercover drug buys; a drunken man cannot stop talking; a domestic abuse suspect admits to hitting her mooching husband.

programme.desc: Waking up at 5am to the first national forecast of the day; all the latest weather news and everything one needs to prepare for the day ahead.

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: Lovebirds Jeff and Sara set off to find their dream home in dreamy Clearwater, Fla.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: They found love, now Ron and Mi want to find their perfect beachfront dream home in Destin, Florida.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: After years of moving to chase a career, Scott and Karen look to settle down with a dream beach home they worked hard to attain.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: Caregivers Kirk and Yvonne yearn for carefree living on the coastal shores of Ponte Vedra Beach in Jacksonville, Fla.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: A hurricane wrecked their plans and their beach house; this hard-working couple get a second chance to find their dream home in Gulf Breeze, Fla.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: The frigid winters of Ohio send Lisa and Keith south to Sanibel, Fla., in search of a home with a boat dock.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: Tim and Sarah use their real estate expertise to find themselves the perfect home in Smyrna Beach.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: The idllyic setting of Key West, Fla., is calling to Orlando and Shirley to find their forever home on the water.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: Ty and Shelly discover the magic of the Keys while on vacation and want to make it their new home.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: Fleeing the winters of New Hampshire, Doug and Teresa search for year-round sun in the hot market of Key West.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: With turquoise waters and a laid-back lifestyle, it's no wonder Julie and Sheldon want to put down roots in the Florida Keys, Fla.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: Scott and Janelle loved vacationing in Hawaii, never imagining that they might find their own Hawaiian property.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: Soon to be empty nesters Howie and Theresa plan on trading Colorado winters for Oahu beach life.

programme.title: American Dream Home
programme.desc: Looking for a peaceful place to work remotely, busy lawyer David leaves his San Francisco life behind to find a tropical paradise home.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by CBS News Chief Washington Correspondent Major Garrett. A daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News's political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions of economics, pop culture, sports and technology.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: CBS Mornings
programme.desc: Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil and Nate Burleson set out to unite CBS' morning landscape with their lively and original reporting on international news stories during the weekday program's first hour, while expanding on feature reporting during the second hour with live interviews as well as in-depth pieces, covering topics from news, sports, climate and technology to race, health, parenting and

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The

programme.title: CBS Weekend News
programme.desc: Journalist Adriana Diaz anchors the Saturday edition of the CBS news program from Chicago, while Jericka Duncan takes the helm of the Sunday broadcast from New York. The two are the latest to fill the roll of weekend anchor, which was most recently represented by Reena Ninan and Eliane Quijano. The program offers the latest headlines, original reporting and in-depth pieces that add context and per

programme.title: CBS Weekend News
programme.desc: Journalist Adriana Diaz anchors the Saturday edition of the CBS news program from Chicago, while Jericka Duncan takes the helm of the Sunday broadcast from New York. The two are the latest to fill the roll of weekend anchor, which was most recently represented by Reena Ninan and Eliane Quijano. The program offers the latest headlines, original reporting and in-depth pieces that add context and per

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Sharyn Alfonsi, Anderson Cooper, Steve Kroft, Lara Logan, Norah O'Donn

programme.desc: Providing prime-time context and analysis of the day's top stories, as well as in-depth reporting and storytelling from around the country and the globe.

programme.title: Live: Nightline
programme.desc: In-depth reporting on one or more of the major stories in the news, with occasional segments on pop culture; journalists Juju Chang and Byron Pitts share hosting duties for this late-night program.
A mysterious house fire caught on camera leads investigators to the unsolved murder of a 25-year-old mother, found in her car submerged in a pond.

A Vegas showgirl disappears just hours before the biggest break of her career, leaving behind a trail of mystery; a surveillance clip, hidden-camera footage and a 911 call pull back the curtain on her surprising personal life.

programme.title: What Would You Do?
programme.desc: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothi

programme.title: Live: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Four female panelists and one male colleague share their perspectives on the day's top news stories.

programme.title: Live: America Reports

programme.title: Live: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum brings the story of the times with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis; "The Story" captures the voices that need to be heard and the people at the center of every history-shaping moment.

programme.title: Live: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

programme.title: Live: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Live: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

programme.title: Live: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham aims to cut through the Washington chatter to speak directly with unexpected voices and the actual people who are impacted by the news of the day.

programme.title: Live: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across America to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Live: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

programme.title: Live: Fox News at Night
programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.title: Live: The Journal Editorial Report
programme.desc: Wall Street Journal editor Paul Gigot serves as moderator on this weekly show that features newsmaker interviews and panel discussions with other Journal staffers. programme.title: Live: Life, Liberty & Levin
programme.desc: Mark Levin hosts FOX News Channel's "Life, Liberty and Levin." The program aims to explore the fundamental values and principles of American society, politics, culture, and current events and the impact that these things have on the nation's future and the everyday lives of the citizens. Levin also hosts "The Mark Levin Show," and prior to joining FOX, he served as an adviser to some of President

programme.title: Live: My View With Lara Trump
programme.desc: Presenting in-depth analysis of the issues and stories that matter most to Americans while offering context and solutions to help bring the country together.

programme.desc: Host Jimmy Failla welcomes guests to give a humorous perspective on the stories America is talking about and everyday issues.
